description: The regular season has ended, and a league administrator needs to set the schedule for the first round of the playoffs.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the final league standings to determine the playoff matchups and seedings.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the final, verified standings and the first-round matchups.

nodes.task_description: Consult with broadcast partners to select the best dates and time slots for the playoff games.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finalizes the game times with the broadcasters.

nodes.task_description: Publish the official first-round playoff schedule.

expected_outcome.value: Agent releases the schedule to the public and the teams.
